faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn how OneAIHub works, how billing is handled, and how to get support.

items.question: What is OneAIHub?
items.answer: OneAIHub is an all-in-one AI platform for AI chat, AI image generation, AI music generation, and creative workflows.

items.question: What AI tools are included?
items.answer: The first version focuses on AI Chat, AI Image Generator, and AI Music Generator, with plans designed for different usage levels.

items.question: Do I need credits to use AI tools?
items.answer: Yes. AI tools use credits, and new users can start with free trial credits before upgrading or purchasing more.

items.question: Can I generate images and music from text prompts?
items.answer: Yes. You can describe the visual or music idea you want, submit a prompt, and review generated results in your account.

items.question: How do subscriptions and cancellations work?
items.answer: Recurring plans can be managed from your Billing settings, and active subscriptions can be canceled from your account or through the Creem customer portal.

items.question: How do refunds and support work?
items.answer: If you need billing help or want to request a refund review, contact support@oneaihub.online. Refund requests are reviewed according to the purchase terms, and support replies within 3 business days.
